name: eslint-config
description: Shared ESLint flat config enforcing the Gravity UI styleguide with TypeScript rules and optional sub-configs for Prettier, a11y, and import order.
when_to_use: Shared ESLint flat config enforcing the Gravity UI styleguide with TypeScript rules and optional sub-configs for Prettier, a11y, and import order
avoid: Not for projects with conflicting custom ESLint rules. Prettier peer dependency required for the prettier sub-config.
not_for: Not for projects with conflicting custom ESLint rules. Prettier peer dependency required for the prettier sub-config.

name: eslint-config
description: Gravity UI ESLint configuration that enforces the Gravity UI styleguide. Includes TypeScript rules by default and optional configs for Prettier integration, accessibility checks, and import order enforcement.
when_to_use: Setting up a new Gravity UI project that needs consistent code style
Adding ESLint to an existing project following the Gravity UI styleguide
Enforcing TypeScript rules alongside JavaScript linting
When you need optional a11y or import-order enforcement on top of base rules
avoid: Do not use if you have a custom ESLint config already enforcing different style rules — the configs may conflict
The prettier sub-config requires Prettier to be installed as a peer dependency
how_to_use: Install with `npm install --save-dev eslint @gravity-ui/eslint-config`. Create `eslint.config.js` with `import baseConfig from '@gravity-ui/eslint-config'; export default [...baseConfig];`. Optionally spread in `@gravity-ui/eslint-config/prettier`, `@gravity-ui/eslint-config/a11y`, or `@gravity-ui/eslint-config/import-order` for extra rule sets.
